data.name: guessing_game_game_ended
data.value: Time is up! The answer was : {0}

data.name: guessing_game_answer_not_found
data.value: No one found the answer in time! The answer was: {0}

data.name: guessing_game_answer_rate_limit
data.value: You are answering too fast! Please wait a moment before trying again.

data.name: guessing_game_round_won
data.value: {0} wins this round ! They now have {1} point{2}

data.name: countries_game_start
data.value: A countriesgame started! Reply with the name of the country directly in the chat.

data.name: capitals_game_start
data.value: A capital cities game started! Reply with the capital city of the given country directly in the chat.

data.name: capitals_game_question_capital
data.value: Which country has {0} as its capital?

data.name: end_guessing_game_no_game
data.value: There's no game currently running in this room.

data.name: c4_game_rules
data.value: Connect {0} in a row to win the game!

data.name: c4_game_how_to_play
data.value: Click on the cells to play

data.name: c4_game_tie_end
data.value: The game ended in a tie.

data.name: c4_game_on_timeout
data.value: {0} were disqualified because they could not play in time.

data.name: c4_game_start_announce
data.value: A connect four game has been created. Use {0}c4j to join.

data.name: guessing_game_invalid_number_turns
data.value: Invalid number of turns (should be between 1 and {0})

data.name: pokedesc_start
data.value: A PokeDesc game has been started! Give the name of the corresponding Pokémon directly in the chat.

data.name: pokecries_started
data.value: A PokeCries games has been created! Write the corresponding Pokémon's name directly in the chat.

data.name: c4_panel_title
data.value: A connect four game has been created!

data.name: c4_panel_ongoing_game
data.value: A connect four game is ongoing... Players: {0}

data.name: c4_leaderboard_empty
data.value: No ratings found yet. Play some games first!

data.name: countries_game_turn_ending_soon
data.value: Time is running out ! {0} seconds left.

data.name: pokerace_already_running
data.value: A Pokémon race is already running! Use -racejoin [Pokémon] to join.

data.name: pokerace_other_game_running
data.value: Another game is already running in this room.

data.name: pokerace_not_running
data.value: No Pokémon race is running. Use -pokerace to start one.

data.name: pokerace_min_players_required
data.value: At least {0} participants are needed to start the race!

data.name: pokerace_cancelled
data.value: The Pokémon race has been cancelled.

data.name: pokerace_join_pokemon_taken
data.value: {0} has already been chosen by another trainer!

data.name: pokerace_auto_start_not_enough_players
data.value: The race could not start automatically: not enough participants (minimum {0}).

data.name: gatekeepers_rules
data.value: A Pokémon is hidden behind its footprint. Click its icon to score a point! Portraits are revealed after 10 seconds, silhouettes after 5.

data.name: games_muted_event
data.value: Public games are temporarily unavailable while an arcade event is in progress.

data.name: games_muted
data.value: Mini-games have been disabled for {0} minutes.

data.name: vf_game_waiting
data.value: A Voltorb Flip game is already waiting for a player.

data.name: vf_panel_waiting_for_player
data.value: A game is waiting for a player to join!

data.name: vf_game_already_running
data.value: Another game is already running in this room.

data.name: vf_game_no_game
data.value: There is no Voltorb Flip game running.

data.name: vf_game_round_active
data.value: A round is already active. Quit it first!

data.name: vf_game_voltorb_hit
data.value: {0} flipped a Voltorb! Level set to {1}.

data.name: vf_game_win
data.value: {0} found all multipliers and won {1} coins! Advancing to level {2}!

data.name: vf_game_quit
data.value: {0} quit the round, keeping {1} coins. Now at level {2}.

data.name: vf_game_cancelled
data.value: The Voltorb Flip game has been cancelled.

data.name: vf_game_not_owner
data.value: Only the player who started this Voltorb Flip game can do that.

data.name: vf_game_timeout
data.value: The Voltorb Flip game ended due to inactivity.

data.name: vf_game_pm_missing_room
data.value: Please specify a room. Usage: -voltorbflip roomname

data.name: vf_game_pm_invalid_room
data.value: The specified room was not found or the bot is not in it.

data.name: vf_panel_how_to_flip
data.value: Click a tile to flip it!

data.name: vf_panel_objective
data.value: Flip all ×2 and ×3 tiles to win the round.

data.name: vf_panel_hint
data.value: Row/column totals are shown as strategy hints.

data.name: vf_panel_timeout_hint
data.value: The game ends automatically after 60 seconds of inactivity.

data.name: lo_panel_waiting_for_player
data.value: A game is waiting for a player!

data.name: lo_game_waiting
data.value: A Lights Out game is already waiting for a player.

data.name: lo_panel_objective
data.value: Objective: turn off all the lights!

data.name: lo_panel_hint
data.value: Clicking a cell toggles it and its neighbors.

data.name: lo_panel_timeout_hint
data.value: Game expires after 2 min of inactivity.

data.name: lo_game_started
data.value: Lights Out - Level {0} ({1}x{2}). Turn off all the lights!

data.name: lo_game_win
data.value: {0} solved the puzzle in {1} moves ({2} ★)! Next level: {3}

data.name: lo_game_timeout
data.value: The Lights Out game ended due to inactivity.

data.name: lo_game_cancelled
data.value: The Lights Out game has been cancelled.

data.name: lo_game_no_game
data.value: No Lights Out game is currently running.

data.name: lo_game_not_owner
data.value: Only the player who started this game can do that.

data.name: lo_game_round_active
data.value: A Lights Out game is already in progress.

data.name: lo_game_already_running
data.value: Another game is already running in this room.

data.name: lo_pm_missing_room
data.value: Please specify a room. Usage: -lightsout roomname

data.name: lo_pm_invalid_room
data.value: The specified room was not found or the bot is not in it.

data.name: lo_leaderboard_empty
data.value: The Lights Out leaderboard is empty.

data.name: fi_panel_waiting_for_player
data.value: A game is waiting for a player!

data.name: fi_game_waiting
data.value: A Flood It game is already waiting for a player.

data.name: fi_panel_objective
data.value: Objective: fill the entire grid with one color!

data.name: fi_panel_hint
data.value: Click any cell to flood the grid with its color.

data.name: fi_panel_timeout_hint
data.value: Game expires after 3 min of inactivity.

data.name: fi_game_started
data.value: Flood It - Level {0} ({1}x{2}). Fill the entire grid!

data.name: fi_game_win
data.value: {0} flooded the grid in {1} moves ({2} ★)! Next level: {3}

data.name: fi_game_timeout
data.value: The Flood It game ended due to inactivity.

data.name: fi_game_cancelled
data.value: The Flood It game has been cancelled.

data.name: fi_game_no_game
data.value: No Flood It game is currently running.

data.name: fi_game_not_owner
data.value: Only the player who started this game can do that.

data.name: fi_game_round_active
data.value: A Flood It game is already in progress.

data.name: fi_game_already_running
data.value: Another game is already running in this room.

data.name: fi_pm_missing_room
data.value: Please specify a room. Usage: -floodit roomname

data.name: fi_pm_invalid_room
data.value: The specified room was not found or the bot is not in it.

data.name: fi_leaderboard_empty
data.value: The Flood It leaderboard is empty.

data.name: fi_game_lose
data.value: {0} ran out of moves after {1}! Try again.

data.name: tfe_panel_waiting_for_player
data.value: A game is waiting for a player!

data.value: A 2048 game is already waiting for a player.

data.name: tfe_panel_hint
data.value: Use the arrow buttons to slide tiles.

data.name: tfe_panel_timeout_hint
data.value: Game expires after 5 min of inactivity.

data.name: tfe_game_started
data.value: 2048 - reach the 2048 tile! Slide tiles to combine them.

data.name: tfe_game_timeout
data.value: The 2048 game ended due to inactivity.

data.name: tfe_game_not_owner
data.value: Only the player who started this game can do that.

data.name: tfe_game_round_active
data.value: A 2048 game is already in progress.

data.name: tfe_game_already_running
data.value: Another game is already running in this room.

data.value: Please specify a room. Usage: -2048 roomname

data.name: tfe_pm_invalid_room
data.value: The specified room was not found or the bot is not in it.

data.name: bj_game_already_active
data.value: You already have an active blackjack game.

data.value: Please specify a room. Usage: -blackjack roomname

data.value: Only the player who started this game can do that.

data.name: rps_help
data.value: Starts a Rock Paper Scissors game. Use -rpsjoin to participate.

data.name: rps_already_running
data.value: A Rock Paper Scissors game is already running! Use -rpsjoin to participate.

data.name: rps_other_game_running
data.value: Another game is already running in this room.

data.name: rps_game_created
data.value: A Rock Paper Scissors game has been created! Use -rpsjoin to participate.

data.name: rps_choose_prompt
data.value: Choose by clicking a button (sent as PM):

data.name: rps_choices_hidden
data.value: Choices are hidden until both players have chosen.

data.name: rps_not_running
data.value: No Rock Paper Scissors game is running. Use -rps to start one.

data.name: rps_already_joined
data.value: You have already joined this game.

data.name: rps_game_full
data.value: The game is already full (2 players).

data.name: rps_already_chosen
data.value: You have already made your choice!

data.name: rps_game_cancelled
data.value: The Rock Paper Scissors game has been cancelled.

data.name: hangman_started_in
data.value: A new hangman game was created in <<{0}>>

data.name: tarot_help
data.value: Starts a game of French Tarot for 3 to 5 players.

data.name: tarot_already_running
data.value: A game of French Tarot is already running in this room.

data.name: tarot_other_game_running
data.value: Another game is already running in this room.

data.name: tarot_game_created
data.value: {0} started a game of French Tarot!

data.name: tarot_not_running
data.value: There is no French Tarot game running here.

data.name: tarot_join_full
data.value: The game is full (5 players max).

data.name: tarot_join_already_joined
data.value: You have already joined the game.

data.name: tarot_quit_not_joined
data.value: You have not joined the game.

data.name: tarot_start_not_a_player
data.value: Only a player who joined can start the game.

data.name: tarot_start_not_enough_players
data.value: At least {0} players are needed to start.

data.name: tarot_bid_too_low
data.value: {0}, your bid must be higher than the current one.

data.name: tarot_bidding_all_passed
data.value: Everyone passed. Redealing a new hand.

data.name: tarot_turn_timeout_warning
data.value: ⏰ Hurry up! You have only {0} seconds left to play before you are timed out.

data.name: tarot_discard_not_in_hand
data.value: Those cards are not all in your hand.

data.name: tarot_discard_forbidden_card
data.value: You cannot discard kings or oudlers.

data.name: tarot_play_illegal
data.value: You can't play that card right now.

data.name: tarot_game_cancelled
data.value: The French Tarot game was cancelled.

data.name: tarot_resend_not_started
data.value: The game hasn't started yet, there is no page to resend.

data.name: tarot_resend_not_a_player
data.value: You are not a player in the current game.

data.name: tarot_sub_not_active
data.value: You can only ask for a substitute during a running game.

data.name: tarot_sub_not_a_player
data.value: You are not a player in the current game.

data.name: tarot_sub_already_player
data.value: You are already in this game.

data.name: tarot_sub_none_pending
data.value: Nobody is looking for a substitute right now.

data.name: tarot_sub_invalid_target
data.value: That player isn't looking for a substitute.

data.name: tarot_sub_requested
data.value: {0} is looking for a substitute! Click the button to take their seat.

data.name: tarot_sub_force_requested
data.value: {0} was put up for substitution by staff! Click the button to take their seat.

data.name: tarot_sub_force_no_target
data.value: Specify the player to put up for substitution.

data.name: tarot_sub_force_not_a_player
data.value: That player is not in the current game.

data.name: tarot_sub_force_already
data.value: {0} is already looking for a substitute.

data.name: tarot_sub_panel_intro
data.value: These players want to be replaced:

data.name: tarot_leaderboard_empty
data.value: No French Tarot games have been recorded yet.

data.name: tarot_stats_not_found
data.value: No French Tarot stats found for {0}.

data.name: tarot_stats_info
data.value: Tarot stats for {0}: Score {1}, Games {2}, Wins {3}, Times taker {4}, Taker wins {5}.

data.name: tarot_bid_unknown
data.value: Unknown bid. Use: pass, petite, garde, gardesans, gardecontre.

data.name: tarot_lobby_intro
data.value: A new game of French Tarot is starting! (3-5 players)

data.name: tarot_lobby_cancelled
data.value: The game was cancelled before it started.

data.name: tarot_lobby_hint
data.value: Type {0}tarotjoin to join, {0}tarotstart to begin ({1}+ players).

data.name: tarot_kingcall_phase
data.value: {0} is calling a king to find a partner...

data.name: tarot_discard_phase
data.value: {0} took the dog and is building the discard...

data.name: tarot_your_turn_call
data.value: Call a king to find your partner:

data.name: tarot_your_turn_discard
data.value: Select your discard ({0}/{1}): click cards to add or remove them.

data.name: tarot_call_must_be_queen
data.value: You hold all four kings, so you must call a queen.

data.name: tarot_discard_trump_not_allowed
data.value: You can only discard trumps when you have no other choice.

data.name: tarot_poignee_not_enough
data.value: You don't have enough trumps to declare a poignée.

data.name: tarot_slam_taker_only
data.value: Only the taker can announce a chelem.

data.name: tarot_result_petit_au_bout
data.value: Petit au bout: +{0} pts for the {1}

data.name: wordle_game_started
data.value: Wordle started! Guess the {0}-letter word. You have {1} tries.

data.name: wordle_game_win
data.value: Congratulations {0}! You found the word in {1} guesses.

data.name: wordle_game_round_active
data.value: A Wordle round is already in progress.

data.name: wordle_game_waiting
data.value: The Wordle game is waiting for a player to join.

data.name: wordle_game_already_running
data.value: Another game is already running in this room.

data.name: wordle_game_no_game
data.value: There is no Wordle game running.

data.name: wordle_game_cancelled
data.value: The Wordle game has been cancelled.

data.name: wordle_game_not_owner
data.value: Only the player or a staff member can stop this game.

data.name: wordle_pm_invalid_room
data.value: I am not in that room.

data.name: wordle_guess_round_not_active
data.value: There is no active round to guess in.

data.name: wordle_guess_not_owner
data.value: You are not the player of this game.

data.name: wordle_guess_invalid_length
data.value: Your guess must be {0} letters long.

data.name: wordle_guess_not_alphabetic
data.value: Your guess must only contain letters.

data.name: wordle_panel_waiting_for_player
data.value: Waiting for a player to join...

data.name: wordle_panel_spoiler_warning
data.value: Use the keyboard below to play. Don't type the word in the chat to avoid spoiling it for others!

data.name: wordle_guess_not_in_list
data.value: That word is not in my word list.

data.name: wordle_already_played_today
data.value: You have already played today's Wordle. Come back tomorrow for a new word!

data.name: wordle_panel_come_back_tomorrow
data.value: Come back tomorrow for a new word!

data.name: games_help
data.value: Displays the list of available games.

data.name: sx_help
data.value: Semantix: guess the French word of the day via semantic similarity. In PM: -semantix roomname

data.name: sx_pm_missing_room
data.value: Please specify a room. Syntax: -semantix roomname

data.name: sx_pm_invalid_room
data.value: The specified room was not found or the bot is not in it.

data.name: sx_already_won_today
data.value: You already found today's word! Come back tomorrow.

data.name: sx_game_unavailable
data.value: Semantix is unavailable at the moment.

data.name: sx_game_api_unavailable
data.value: The similarity service is temporarily unavailable, please try again later.

data.name: sx_game_started
data.value: Semantix — guess the French word of the day! The semantically closer your word, the higher the temperature.

data.name: sx_game_win
data.value: 🎉 {0} found the word of the day in {1} guess(es)!

data.name: sx_game_timeout
data.value: The Semantix session closed due to inactivity. Restart with -semantix (session guesses are lost).

data.name: sx_game_cancelled
data.value: The Semantix session has been closed.

data.name: sx_game_no_game
data.value: No Semantix game in progress. Start one with -semantix.

data.name: sx_guess_help
data.value: Syntax: -sxg word (in room) or -sxg room, word (in PM)

data.name: sx_guess_not_owner
data.value: This is not your game! Start your own with -semantix.

data.name: sx_guess_not_in_list
data.value: This word is not in the game's dictionary.

data.name: sx_guess_cooldown
data.value: Slow down! Wait a few seconds between guesses.

data.name: sx_panel_answer_was
data.value: The word of the day was: {0}

data.name: sx_panel_no_guess_yet
data.value: No guesses yet. Try a first word!

data.name: belote_help
data.value: Starts a game of Belote for 4 players in two teams.

data.name: belote_already_running
data.value: A game of Belote is already running in this room.

data.name: belote_other_game_running
data.value: Another game is already running in this room.

data.name: belote_not_running
data.value: There is no game of Belote running in this room.

data.name: belote_join_already_started
data.value: The game has already started, you can no longer join.

data.name: belote_join_full
data.value: The game is already full (4 players).

data.name: belote_join_already_joined
data.value: You have already joined this game.

data.name: belote_start_not_enough_players
data.value: Belote needs exactly {0} players to start.

data.name: belote_bidding_all_passed
data.value: Everyone passed: the deal is cancelled.

data.name: belote_turn_timeout_warning
data.value: ⏰ Hurry up! You have only {0} seconds left to play before you are timed out.

data.name: belote_bid_choose_suit
data.value: You must choose a trump suit (hearts, spades, diamonds or clubs).

data.name: belote_bid_suit_forbidden
data.value: You cannot choose the suit of the turned-up card in the second round.

data.name: belote_play_not_in_hand
data.value: You do not have that card in your hand.

data.name: belote_play_illegal
data.value: You cannot play that card right now.

data.name: belote_game_cancelled
data.value: The game of Belote has been cancelled.

data.name: belote_resend_not_started
data.value: The game has not started yet.

data.name: belote_resend_not_a_player
data.value: You are not a player in this game.

data.name: belote_sub_not_active
data.value: There is no active game to substitute into.

data.name: belote_sub_not_a_player
data.value: You are not a player in this game.

data.name: belote_sub_already_player
data.value: You are already a player in this game.

data.name: belote_sub_none_pending
data.value: No player is asking for a substitute.

data.name: belote_sub_invalid_target
data.value: That player is not asking for a substitute.

data.name: belote_sub_requested
data.value: {0} is asking to be replaced. Click the button to take their seat.

data.name: belote_sub_panel_intro
data.value: Click a button to take a player's seat:

data.name: belote_leaderboard_empty
data.value: No Belote games have been recorded yet.

data.name: belote_stats_info
data.value: Belote stats for {0}: Score {1}, Games {2}, Wins {3}, Times taker {4}, Contracts made {5}.

data.name: belote_bid_unknown
data.value: Unknown bid. Use 'take', 'pass' or a suit name.

data.name: belote_lobby_intro
data.value: A new game of Belote is starting! (4 players, 2 teams)

data.name: belote_lobby_cancelled
data.value: The game was cancelled before it started.

data.name: belote_lobby_hint
data.value: Type {0}belotejoin to join, {0}belotestart to begin ({1} players).

data.name: belote_your_turn_bid_one
data.value: Take the turned-up card as trump ({0}) or pass?

data.name: belote_your_turn_bid_two
data.value: Choose a trump suit or pass:

data.name: battleship_your_turn
data.value: It's your turn! Click a cell in the enemy waters to fire.

data.name: battleship_how_to_fire
data.value: Click a cell in the enemy waters to fire at it.

data.name: battleship_panel_title
data.value: A Battleship game has been created!

data.name: battleship_on_timeout
data.value: {0} was disqualified for not firing in time.

data.name: battleship_leaderboard_empty
data.value: No ratings found yet. Play some games first!

data.name: battleship_place_instruction
data.value: Place your {0} (size {1}). Click a cell to set its bow.

data.name: battleship_placement_waiting
data.value: Fleet ready! Waiting for your opponent to finish placing...

data.name: battleship_placement_timeout
data.value: Placement time is up! Remaining ships were placed randomly.

data.name: chess_game_how_to_play
data.value: Click a piece, then its destination to move.

data.name: chess_game_time_control
data.value: Blitz: {0} min + {1} s increment per move

data.name: chess_game_draw_end
data.value: The game ended in a draw.

data.name: chess_game_on_timeout
data.value: {0} was disqualified because they could not play in time.

data.name: chess_panel_title
data.value: A chess game has been created!

data.name: chess_panel_ongoing_game
data.value: A chess game is ongoing... Players: {0}

data.name: chess_leaderboard_empty
data.value: No ratings found yet. Play some games first!
